summary: Systems architecture review accepts the committed M7 design-token and asset-slot foundation. The diff is confined to allowed UI, map-renderer, Storybook, tests, and process-message/state paths; no forbidden sim-core, sim-ai, protocol, save-format, Electron, desktop, content-source, dependency, roadmap, ADR, gate, or release artifact path was touched. The new token and slot APIs are explicit presentation schemas, all current slots remain neutral placeholders, map-renderer tokens are derived from read-model snapshots plus viewport intent, and no token, slot, Pixi node, React state, or canvas fallback becomes simulation, history, content, save, command, or authoritative state.

tests_run.result: Clean worktree on feat/m7-design-tokens-asset-slots tracking origin/feat/m7-design-tokens-asset-slots before and after local tests.
20 changed paths, all in .storybook, apps/web styles, packages/ui, packages/map-renderer, tests, project/messages, project task/status routing files.
Compared diff paths from e9f1a4b43d34460b23908f31a8146723004cf5cf to HEAD against task allowed_paths/forbidden_paths: fileCount 20, violations [], forbiddenHits [].
No dependency manifest or lockfile changes matched; rg exit 1 means no matches.
No forbidden package/app/content/tools/docs/.github paths matched; rg exit 1 means no matches.
Task registry command succeeded; M7-DESIGN-TOKENS-ASSET-SLOTS-001 is REVIEW.
Ready command succeeded; current ready candidate is M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001, independent of this review route.

tests_run.command: node -e <JSON parse/shape check for task and writer handoff>
tests_run.result: Parsed task and writer handoff; taskStatus REVIEW, handoffStatus REVIEW, handoffRouteTo systems_architect, tests 13, artifacts 11.
No forbidden sim-core/protocol/save-format, Node IO, Electron, or direct Pixi package imports matched in the reviewed implementation files; rg exit 1 means no matches.
No randomness, real-time, storage, or UUID authority sources matched in the reviewed implementation files; rg exit 1 means no matches.

Vitest passed: 1 test file, 15 tests. Covers token export, semantic states, neutral placeholder slots, English/zh-CN stress, debug on/off, no WorldState leakage, and read-model immutability for localization display.
Vitest passed: 1 test file, 5 tests. Covers tokenized render plans, read-model delta cache rebuild, and no sim-core/WorldState import in map-renderer source.
Prettier format check, ESLint, recursive typecheck, and architecture boundary check passed. Architecture checker reported boundaries passed and its self-test fixture produced 15 expected violations.

decisions.decision: Accept the design tokens and asset slots as UI/presentation foundation only. They are not content, history, save, command, protocol, or simulation authority.

No ADR is required for this implementation because it does not change package dependency direction, Worker authority, save/protocol schemas, Electron security, core architecture, or frozen product/platform decisions.

Accept MAP_RENDER_TOKENS as map-renderer presentation constants consumed while building render instructions from ClientMapReadModelSnapshot and MapRenderViewport. Pixi/canvas output remains rebuildable render cache.

Accept the slot registry because all current slot instances are neutral-placeholder, cultural/historical/localization review gates are explicit, and no final art asset path or culture-specific symbol is approved.

risks.summary: Existing shell CSS still has many legacy literal values. This task establishes tokens and CSS variables but does not complete full product-shell migration.
risks.mitigation: Downstream M7 app shell, map, district inspector, appointment, guidance, and regression tasks should consume these token APIs as they touch each surface.

risks.summary: The approved-final-art union type exists for future explicit replacement but no final art is approved here.
risks.mitigation: Any culture-specific symbols, portraits, scripts, flags, religious imagery, clothing, architecture, music, or ritual motifs must route through art, culture, historical, and localization review before replacement.

risks.summary: Systems review did not rerun pnpm build:web, pnpm storybook:build, or pnpm test:e2e --project=chromium because this review was instructed to avoid writes except the handoff JSON. The writer handoff and route file record those commands as passed, including lead-verified evidence.
risks.mitigation: Route to qa_reviewer for independent QA review and any artifact-generating verification appropriate to the QA lane.

requested_action: qa_reviewer should perform independent QA review of the accepted systems boundary result, with focus on Storybook/E2E evidence, artifact-generating build verification as appropriate, and downstream consumability for M7 app shell, map presentation, district inspector, appointment flow, guidance, and UI regression tasks.

external_test_evidence_reviewed: Writer handoff records pnpm build:web exit 0 with existing large chunk warnings.
Writer handoff records pnpm storybook:build exit 0 with existing Storybook warnings.
Writer handoff records pnpm test:e2e --project=chromium exit 0, 15/15 passed.
Route file records lead-verified writer handoff validation, task validation, git diff --check, UI/map-renderer tests, web build, Storybook build, pnpm check, and Chromium E2E.
